name: Matte Paste
description: Use for pliable control, creating both hold and texture. Great definition with a natural finish.
ingredients: Aqua, Petrolatum, Lanolin, VP/VA Copolymer, PVP, Cetyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Copernicia Cerifera (Carnauba) Wax, Ozokerite, Paraffinum Liquidum, Propylene Glycol, Alcohol Denat, Polyacrylamide, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Benzyl Alcohol, Dehydroacetic Acid, Parfum, CI77499, Citral, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellol, Limonene, Linalool.
